mapper.sql:
select shd.user_info_user_info_id_1 , sdr.sensor_data_record_id , shd.smart_device_type_enum_smart_device_type_enum_id_1 , shd.is_on , sdr.sensor_value , shd.current_value , shd.room_name , shd.last_update_time , sdr.smart_home_device_smart_device_id_1 , shd.device_name , shd.brightness , shd.smart_device_status_enum_smart_device_status_enum_id_1 , sdr.record_time
FROM sensor_data_record sdr left join smart_home_device shd on sdr.smart_home_device_smart_device_id_1 = shd.smart_device_id
mapper.select:
select shd.user_info_user_info_id_1 , sdr.sensor_data_record_id , shd.smart_device_type_enum_smart_device_type_enum_id_1 , shd.is_on , sdr.sensor_value , shd.current_value , shd.room_name , shd.last_update_time , sdr.smart_home_device_smart_device_id_1 , shd.device_name , shd.brightness , shd.smart_device_status_enum_smart_device_status_enum_id_1 , sdr.record_time
FROM sensor_data_record sdr left join
smart_home_device
shd on sdr.smart_home_device_smart_device_id_1 = shd.smart_device_id
${ew.customSqlSegment}
